articles.title: Kohli: 'Didn't feel like the same pressure as last year'
articles.description: Here is how Patidar, Hazlewood, Pandya, Bhuvneshwar and others reacted to RCB defending their title

articles.title: Kohli, bowlers lead RCB to second straight IPL title
articles.description: Kohli chose this final to hit his fastest IPL fifty and his highest playoff score, leading a five-wicket win with two overs to spare

articles.title: Sooryavanshi wins Orange Cap, MVP and Emerging Player awards in IPL 2026
articles.description: The 15-year-old batter was the first to win both the MVP and Emerging Player awards in the same season

articles.title: Tendulkar's IPL reforms: no impact player, two-part powerplay, five overs for one bowler
articles.description: What's the best way to return some semblance of balance between bat and ball at the IPL? Sachin Tendulkar has a three-part solution

articles.title: Home comfort vs championship pedigree as GT and RCB collide in IPL 2026 final
articles.description: Although RCB won Qualifier 1, it was GT who were victors when they faced off in Ahmedabad during the league stage

articles.title: Gill 104 trumps Sooryavanshi 96 as GT enter IPL final
articles.description: While Sooryavanshi played an almost lone hand for RR, GT had Gill and Sai Sudharsan firing at both ends

articles.title: Rishabh Pant steps down as LSG captain
articles.description: Decision taken after Lucknow Super Giants finished last in IPL 2026; they had finished seventh under his leadership in 2025

articles.title: Sooryavanshi's 97 off 29 knocks SRH out
articles.description: Jofra Archer's three early wickets seal Rajasthan Royals' progress into Qualifier 2 to face Gujarat Titans

articles.title: Patidar leads the way as RCB storm into second straight final
articles.description: After amassing 254, the RCB quicks ran riot, taking out half of GT's side in the powerplay and eventually bowling them out for 162

articles.title: ‘Don’t put me on the spot’ - Ajit Agarkar left amused by tricky questions on India selections
articles.description: The event was held in Mumbai to honour the legends of the game.

articles.title: Ruturaj Gaikwad added to India A squad as Riyan Parag's replacement for Sri Lanka tri-series
articles.description: Parag was initially named vice captain of the squad and was set to serve as deputy to Tilak Varma. However, that title has been taken over by the incoming Gaikwad.
